context: Admin POS Dashboard for Food Distribution at Construction Sites (FoodPlug)

typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl tracking-tight text-[#2C423F] font-black font-['Cabinet_Grotesk']
typography.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl tracking-tight text-[#2C423F] font-bold font-['Cabinet_Grotesk']
typography.h3: text-xl sm:text-2xl tracking-tight text-[#2C423F] font-bold font-['Cabinet_Grotesk']
typography.label: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#5C5C59] font-bold font-['Manrope']

spacing_and_layout.alignment: Optical alignment, left-aligned standard content, top-left priority for main KPIs.

components.buttons: bg-[#D95D39] text-white rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-bold hover:bg-[#C2502F] transition-colors shadow-sm
components.buttons_secondary: bg-white border border-[#E8E6E1] text-[#2C423F] rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-bold hover:bg-[#F9F8F6] transition-colors
components.inputs: bg-white border border-[#E8E6E1] rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-[#2C423F] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#D95D39]/50
components.table_th: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#5C5C59] font-bold pb-4 border-b border-[#E8E6E1]
components.charts: Use Recharts (integrated via Shadcn). Use #D95D39 for primary lines/bars, #D4A373 for secondary data points.

icons.style: Clean, stroke-based, consistent sizing (w-5 h-5 for inline, w-8 h-8 for metric cards). Use text-[#D95D39] for primary actions/highlights.

logo.description: Abstract food logo to be used as the FoodPlug brand mark in the top-left of the sidebar.

food_plate.description: African Egusi soup plate. Use this for the 'Sales Agent View' when registering food sales, or as a decorative element for meal items.

worker_avatar_1.description: Construction worker with a white hard hat. Use as a placeholder avatar in the Customers list or recent sales table.

worker_avatar_2.description: Construction worker with a red hard hat. Use as a placeholder avatar for sales reps or specific customers.

instructions_to_main_agent: Inject the HTML link tags for 'Cabinet Grotesk' and 'Manrope' into the public/index.html file or equivalent entry point.
Add 'Cabinet Grotesk' and 'Manrope' to your tailwind.config.js font family extensions to use `font-['Cabinet_Grotesk']` and `font-['Manrope']`.
Build the admin dashboard using a fixed, collapsible left-sidebar layout (a standard SaaS pattern) with the main content area taking the remaining width.
Implement the 'Control Room' Bento Grid for the dashboard overview. The top-left KPI (Revenue) MUST be visually prioritized.
Dashboard cards must use pure white backgrounds (`bg-white`), a 1px `#E8E6E1` border, and soft ambient shadows (`shadow-sm` or the specified box-shadow).
Use Shadcn UI components (Cards, Tables, Dialogs, Selects, Forms) but customize them by overriding default Vercel colors with the defined earthy palette.
Data Test IDs: Every interactive element (buttons, filters, inputs, navigation links) MUST have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="login-submit-button"`).
Currency Display: All monetary values MUST be displayed in Naira (₦).
Use Shadcn Charts (Recharts) for the Revenue/Sales chart, styled with the primary Terracotta (#D95D39) color line.
For the Sales Agent view, ensure a clean, distraction-free POS-style interface to quickly search customers (by Name/PIN) and register meals.
Do NOT use generic placeholders (like via.placeholder.com). Always use the provided media URLs for logos, avatars, and food products.
